---
## Goal
- Add `context.Context` parameter to `NewRepository` constructor across the entire repository (target: 11 packages with NewRepository functions - auth/password, iam, authtoken, auth/oidc, credential/static, server, daemon/controller)

## Constraints & Preferences
- Change must be applied everywhere
- Project must still typecheck after changes
- Use `ago_add_param` to add parameter across all callers simultaneously

## Progress
### Done
- Searched for `NewRepository` symbol and found 11 packages
- Inspected `auth/password/NewRepository` signature
- Identified main callers for `auth/password/NewRepository` (cmd/base, daemon/controller, test files)

### In Progress
- Planning to use `ago_add_param` to add `context.Context` parameter with default value across all NewRepository functions and their callers simultaneously
- Not yet executed any `ago_add_param` commands

### Blocked
- (none)

## Key Decisions
- Will use `ago_add_param` to modify all function definitions and their corresponding callers at the same time
- Parameter will be added with default value to maintain backward compatibility where possible

## Next Steps
1. Execute `ago_add_param` on `auth/password/NewRepository` to add `ctx context.Context Context` parameter
2. Repeat for remaining 10 packages (iam, authtoken, oidc, credential/static, server, daemon/controller)
3. Run typecheck/validation after each change batch to ensure project still builds

## Critical Context
- Repository has 18 search results mentioning `NewRepository`, but only 11 distinct function definitions (based on package names shown)
- Callers include production code (cmd/base, daemon/controller) and test code
- Typechecking must pass after refactor completes

## Relevant Files
- `/boundary/internal/auth/password/repository.go:25` - NewRepository definition to modify first
- `/boundary/internal/cmd/base/initial_resources.go:91` - caller that needs update
- `/boundary/internal/daemon/controller/controller.go:334` - caller that needs update
---

## Goal

## Constraints & Preferences
- Change must be applied everywhere
- Project must still typecheck after changes
- Use `ago_add_param` to add parameter across all callers simultaneously

## Progress
### Done
- Searched for `NewRepository` symbol and found 18 results (11 distinct function definitions)
- Inspected `auth/password/NewRepository` signature - takes `(r db.Reader, w db.Writer, kms *kms.Kms, opt ...Option)`
- Confirmed caller in `/boundary/internal/cmd/base/initial_resources.go:74` where `password.NewRepository(rw, rw, kmsCache)` is called WITHOUT context
- Confirmed callers exist in production code (cmd/base, daemon/controller), not just tests

4. Run typecheck/validation after each change batch to ensure project still builds
